product: Lakeflow Connect row filtering is now generally available ​
tagline: July 2, 2026 Row filtering in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available.
what_it_does: July 2, 2026 Row filtering in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available. Row filtering allows you to ingest only the rows you need by applying conditions similar to a SQL WHERE clause, improving performance and minimizing data duplication.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: July 2, 2026 Row
capabilities.desc: July 2, 2026 Row filtering in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available.

key_takeaway: July 2, 2026 Row filtering in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available.
